prompt: A high-quality anime-style illustration of a beautiful female android maid with long white hair and striking blue eyes. She wears a highly detailed black and white frilly maid outfit integrated with futuristic white mechanical armor plating on her arms and legs, featuring glowing blue cybernetic accents and joints. On her chest is a small digital screen displaying a glowing blue heartbeat monitor line. She has mechanical headphone-like ears beneath a traditional maid headdress. She is standing in a bright, sunlit modern apartment bedroom with large windows overlooking a futuristic city skyline. The lighting is soft and cinematic, with glowing dust motes in the air. She has a gentle, slightly melancholic expression, with one hand resting softly near her chest screen. The image features elegant typography overlays. At the very top, small delicate text reads "感情は、まだうまく名前にできない。". At the bottom, large elegant Japanese text reads "絢瀬アリシア", with the English text "AYASE ALICIA" directly below it. Underneath that, smaller text reads "旧式家庭支援アンドロイド、感情学習中。". The overall aesthetic is like a sci-fi light novel cover or visual novel key visual.
